title: A Night at the Silent Movie Theater
original_title: A Night at the Silent Movie Theater
overview: A raucous comedy of errors about a singer stuck in a dead-end job who sees his last, best shot at rock stardom threatened by freak accidents, movie theater politics, stressed-out relationships and a janitor who is much more than he seems.
